title: Chromasync Batch Manifest
description: Defines one or more theme generation jobs. Run with: chromasync batch --file <manifest.toml>. The singular 'job' key is also accepted as an alias for 'jobs'.

job.description: A single theme generation job. Exactly one of 'seed' or 'image' must be set.

name.description: Label for log and error messages.

seed.description: Hex seed color (e.g. "#4ecdc4"). Mutually exclusive with 'image'.

image.description: Path to a wallpaper image. Resolved relative to the manifest file. Mutually exclusive with 'seed'.

template.description: Template name (built-in lookup) or path to a .toml template file. Optional if all targets specify preferred_template.

chroma.description: Chroma strategy used when generating palette families.

targets.description: Target names (built-in) or paths to .toml target specs. A value is treated as a path if it contains '/', starts with an absolute prefix, or ends with '.toml'.

output.description: Output directory for generated artifacts. Resolved relative to the manifest file.
